author: doll-agent
content: Added decision_function to FittedGradientBoostingClassifier (binary: cumulative log-odds, multiclass: per-class cumulative scores), FittedHistGradientBoostingClassifier (same), and FittedAdaBoostClassifier (SAMME: weighted vote sums; SAMME.R: accumulated h_k scores). Returns Array2<F> with shape (n_samples, 1) for binary and (n_samples, n_classes) for multiclass — slight divergence from sklearn (which returns (n_samples,) for binary), kept 2-D for type uniformity. Documented in each method's doc comment. All 343 tests pass.
